title: Godetia macrantha
taxonomy: Godetia macrantha is classified as a species within the plant family Polemoniaceae. This family consists of about 22 genera, and Godetia macrantha is a member of the genus Godetia. The genus Godetia is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The species Godetia macrantha is also known as the large-flowered godetia or macrantha godetia. It is a perennial plant that is often grown for its vibrant flowers.

It has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its medicinal uses.
